---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's missing or painful today? What check or behaviour would help?

## Proposed solution

How do you imagine it working? If relevant, include a sample `tables.csv`
entry, CLI flag, env var, or report output you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues.
